seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: VERSATILE VINTAGE BASE UNIT: The ePure Premium landline base unit displays date, time, caller ID* and messages. Reject calls at the touch of a button. Practical and intuitive to manage your communications. Operator box compatible.

INTUITIVE ANSWERMACHINE: This Alcatel fixed wireless phone offers 30 minutes of recording time. Easily access functions via the base to check your messages and choose the ones you want to listen to directly on the handset.

HANDS-FREE FUNCTION AND HIGH DEFINITION DISPLAY: The phone features a white graphic display and large characters for optimum legibility. Enjoy clear conversations thanks to a high-quality speakerphone, while keeping your hands free.

CALL BLOCKING AND PERFORMING DIRECTORY: Block up to 100 unwanted numbers with a dedicated key or automatically. Enjoy a phonebook of 100 contacts, with VIP ring tones, automatically synchronised on up to 4 handsets per base.
TELEPHONY LEADER : A French brand specialising in telecommunications, Alcatel is one of the world leaders in telephony.

Ready for UK Digital Changeover. Two telephone line cords are included in the box : select BT plug or RJ11 plug for some hubs / routers. 3 Pin Plug / Power Adaptor included for use in UK & Ireland only.
